name: Nekroz of Unicore
name_jp: ユニコールの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>影霊衣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネクロス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with any "Nekroz" Ritual Spell. Must be Ritual Summoned. You can discard this card, then target 1 "Nekroz" card in your GY, except "Nekroz of Unicore"; add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Nekroz of Unicore" once per turn. Negate the effects of face-up monsters on the field that were Special Summoned from the Extra Deck.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with any "Nekroz" Ritual Spell. Must be Ritual Summoned. You can discard this card, then target 1 "Nekroz" card in your GY, except "Nekroz of Unicore"; add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Nekroz of Unicore" once per turn. Negate the effects of face-up monsters on the field that were Special Summoned from the Extra Deck.

You can discard this card, then target 1 "Nekroz" card in your GY, except "Nekroz of Unicore"; add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Nekroz of Unicore" once per turn. eff_types: Summoning condition, Summoning condition,Ignition, Condition, Continuous
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
